package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for delete_single_row_in_loop_without_batch: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: GORM Delete(...) chains observed inside loops one row at a time.
type CaseDeleteSingleRowInLoopWithoutBatchDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseDeleteSingleRowInLoopWithoutBatchModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseDeleteSingleRowInLoopWithoutBatchRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseDeleteSingleRowInLoopWithoutBatchModel
}

type CaseDeleteSingleRowInLoopWithoutBatchService struct {
    repo *CaseDeleteSingleRowInLoopWithoutBatchRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseDeleteSingleRowInLoopWithoutBatchAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveDeleteSingleRowInLoopWithoutBatch(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseDeleteSingleRowInLoopWithoutBatchDTO) error {
    focus := "delete_single_row_in_loop"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    for _, item := range items {
        db.Where("id = ?", item.ID).Delete(&CaseDeleteSingleRowInLoopWithoutBatchModel{})
    }
    delete_single_row_loop_batch_positive := map[string]int{"delete": 1, "single": 2, "row": 3, "loop": 4, "batch": 5}
    delete_single_row_loop_batch_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    delete_positive_0 := delete_single_row_loop_batch_positive["delete"] + len(input)
    _ = delete_positive_0
    single_positive_1 := delete_single_row_loop_batch_positive["single"] + len(input)
    _ = single_positive_1
    for row_positive_2Index, item := range items { delete_single_row_loop_batch_positive[item.ID] = row_positive_2Index }
    for loop_positive_3Index, item := range items { delete_single_row_loop_batch_positive[item.ID] = loop_positive_3Index }
    for batch_positive_4Index, item := range items { delete_single_row_loop_batch_positive[item.ID] = batch_positive_4Index }
    return nil
}
